summary: Verified the bug fix for partner org creation from admin panel. New endpoint POST /api/admin/tenants/create-partner works correctly. All 11 backend tests pass. Full frontend E2E flow verified: Login as platform admin → Partner Orgs tab → New Partner Org form → Submit → Success dialog with partner_code displayed → Done closes dialog → New org in list.

design_issues.screen: Admin Panel - New Partner Org dialog
issues: Address fields (Line 1, City, Postal, Country) are marked as required in the form because the form uses the same schema as the public partner signup page (PartnerOrgForm component). For admin-created partner orgs, address may not always be available. Consider making address optional in the admin context or using a separate, simpler form.
First row in the list shows an unnamed tenant with empty 'code:' text — possibly a legacy/seed record with no name or code set. Minor cosmetic issue.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Consider making address fields optional (not required) in the admin create-partner dialog since admin may not always have the partner's address. Currently the form blocks submission until address is filled.
OPTIONAL: Investigate unnamed tenant (empty name/code) appearing first in Partner Organizations list.
critical_code_review_comments: The PartnerOrgForm component (shared between admin dialog and public signup page) uses the same schema which marks address as required. In admin dialog context (TenantsTab.tsx), this forces admins to fill in address to create a partner org. The backend /api/admin/tenants/create-partner does NOT require address, so the frontend-only validation may be unnecessarily restrictive.

Admin login note: Platform admin uses /api/auth/login (no partner_code) NOT /api/auth/partner-login (which blocks 'automate-accounts' code). This is correct behavior but worth documenting for future testers.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed partner orgs during testing (e.g. test-org-delta-32044). These are live data in the database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The bug fix for admin panel partner creation is verified working. Key flow: 1) Platform admin logs in via /api/auth/login (NOT /api/auth/partner-login) with no partner_code. 2) Navigate to Admin > Partner Orgs > New Partner Org. 3) Fill form (org name, admin name/email/password, address required by form). 4) Submit → success dialog shows auto-generated partner_code. 5) Created partner_super_admin can login via /api/auth/partner-login with the returned code. The PartnerOrgForm requires address fields which may be a minor UX concern for admin-created orgs.
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause was frontend calling /auth/register-partner (public OTP endpoint) which returns {message: 'Verification required'} without a partner_code. Fix: new endpoint /api/admin/tenants/create-partner creates tenant + partner_super_admin user directly (no OTP) and returns partner_code immediately. Frontend TenantsTab.tsx updated to call the new admin endpoint.
